name: I-Dexamethasone
description: I-corticosteroid yokwenziwa esebenza isikhathi eside. Isetshenziselwa i-cerebral edema (i-high altitude cerebral edema -- HACE, TBI), ukungezwani okunamandla, i-airway edema, kanye ne-adrenal crisis. Anti-inflammatory, hhayi Anabolic.
indications: I-cerebral edema evela ku-tumor noma ithumba
dose: I-Cerebral edema/HACE: 8-10 mg IV/IM kokuqala, bese kuba ngu-4 mg q6h. I-Airway edema: 10 mg IV kanye. I-Croup: 0.6 mg/kg IM/PO (ubukhulu obungu-16mg). Inkinga ye-Adrenal: 4 mg IV.
window: HACE: Nikeza ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka kanye nokwehla ngokushesha.
contraindications: Imithi yokugomela igciwane bukhoma phakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-30 (isihlobo)
warnings: Ayithathi indawo yokwehla nomoya-mpilo we-HACE -- sebenzisa njenge-adjunct kuphela.
I-Hyperglycemia - ukuqapha ushukela wegazi kwabanesifo sikashukela.
Imithamo eyodwa yezimo eziphuthumayo ngokuvamile iphephe kakhulu.

pediatric.dose: I-Croup: 0.6 mg/kg PO/IM (ubukhulu obungu-16 mg). I-cerebral edema: 0.5-1 mg/kg IV (ubukhulu obungu-10 mg). I-Airway edema: 0.5 mg/kg IV.

obstetric.note: 12 mg IM q24h x 2 imithamo esetshenziselwa ukusheshisa ukuvuthwa kwamaphaphu engane emasontweni angama-24-34 okukhulelwa esibelethweni sangaphambi kwesikhathi. Xoxa nomhlinzeki ophezulu otholakalayo.

source: JTS CPG / Wilderness Medicine / Standard Emergency Pharmacology
